title: DEARLIVES 6 Pcs Blue Confetti Cannons, Biodegradable Confetti Wedding Party Poppers 11cm with Twisting Black Turntable to Left for Graduation Bridal Anniversary New Year Celebration Supplies
features: 💕 CELEBRATE WITH A BANG-- “Bang”, the confetti cannon can produce the beautiful effect of confetti. It will last for a few seconds. The falling confetti will create a romantic atmosphere, which is very suitable for taking pictures to capture this memorable moment.

💕 BIODEGRADABLE PAPER-- Party cannon contains 90% biodegradable paper and 10% golden plastic sheet. The combination of the two will make the confetti more beautiful. This also reduces the burden of cleaning, only the plastic sheet needs to be cleaned.

💕 SIMPLE TO USE-- You only need to rotate the turntable in the direction of the heart-shaped arrow at the bottom, and you will get a unique confetti rain. An 11 cm biodegradable confetti cannon can fly about 20-30 cm high, while a 20 cm party poppers large has a range of 2-3 m. You can choose the cannon you like.

💕 CREATING ATMOSPHERE--Confetti poppers can create a romantic or heat atmosphere for parties that keep everyone interested and happy. It can used for propose weddings, anniversaries, birthdays, baby showers, Christmases and any other holiday you can think of.

💕 SPECIAL NOTE-- Firstly, the squeeze and collision in the international long distance cause the problem of color paper leakage. As long as the bottom spring is not broken, it will not affect the use effect. If it does not work, you may have turned the wrong direction. Secondly, when using it, please face the sky, don't face yourself or other people's body, so as to avoid accidental injury.
